title: Top Header Link
description: Top header link group with border-light hover for text and icon

styles.css: &{cursor: pointer;} & a, & .wp-block-outermost-icon-block{transition: color 200ms ease;} & a{text-decoration: none;} &:hover a, &:hover .wp-block-outermost-icon-block{color: var(--wp--preset--color--border-light);} &:hover a{text-decoration: none;}
